title: ModelManifest
description: A model MANIFEST (capability/synced, HSM-16-08): 'this node has this model, with these capabilities.' AVAILABILITY INVARIANT (load-bearing): the model binary NEVER syncs — additionalProperties:false makes any path/url/bytes-shaped field a validation failure. This is how a surface knows what 'run it on your desktop' would actually run. Canonical hub emission: ModelManifestRecord.to_dict().
